                              results := [ValType.i32] },
                          (VerifiedJS.Wasm.EmitAcc.types✝⁵ v✝).size)).snd }],
          funcs := VerifiedJS.Wasm.EmitAcc.funcs✝ v✝,
          tables :=
            if m.tableEntries.isEmpty = true then #[]
            else
              #[{ elem := ElemType.funcref, lim := { min := m.tableEntries.size, max := some m.tableEntries.size } }],
          memories := m.memories.toList.toArray,
          globals :=
            (List.map
                (fun x =>
                  {
                    type :=
                      { val := VerifiedJS.Wasm.irTypeToValType✝ x.fst,
                        mutability := if x.2.fst = true then Mut.var else Mut.const_ },
                    init :=
                      match VerifiedJS.Wasm.irTypeToValType✝¹ x.fst with
                      | ValType.i32 => [Instr.i32Const (UInt32.ofNat (x.2.snd.toNat?.getD 0))]
                      | ValType.i64 => [Instr.i64Const (UInt64.ofNat (x.2.snd.toNat?.getD 0))]
                      | ValType.f64 =>
                        if x.2.snd.trimAscii.toString.startsWith "bits:" = true then
                          match (x.2.snd.trimAscii.toString.drop 5).toString.toNat? with
                          | some n => [Instr.i64Const (UInt64.ofNat n), Instr.f64ReinterpretI64]
                          | none => [Instr.f64Const 0.0]
                        else [Instr.f64Const ((VerifiedJS.Wasm.parseF64Literal?✝ x.2.snd).getD 0.0)]
                      | ValType.f32 => [Instr.f32Const 0.0] })
                m.globals.toList).toArray,
          exports :=

          start := m.startFunc,
          elems :=
            if m.tableEntries.isEmpty = true then #[]
            else #[{ tableIdx := 0, offset := [Instr.i32Const 0], funcIdxs := m.tableEntries.toList }],
          datas :=
